mapper.select:
select bu.id, bu.user_id, bu.category_id, bu.amount_limit, bu.period, bu.alert_threshold, bu.is_alerted80, bu.is_alerted100,
ui.name as userName, ui.images as userImages
from budgets bu left join user_info ui on (ui.id = bu.user_id) where 1 = 1
AND ui.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.userName},'%')
AND ui.user_id = #{queryFrom.userId}
order by bu.id desc
